body_txt: A person is Brainwashed so that, on a certain trigger (either a situation, or else a phrase only someone in the know would ever say), they will go from their normal self to The Mole ; they will most often remember nothing afterward. Occasionally, they can be programmed to do even more serious crimes, such as attacking their teammates outright, but their true value lies in the fact that their cover is so deep that not even they themselves realise it. If they or their teammates discover the truth, expect a lot of angst . Whether or not they are are able to break free of their programming (or at least, soon enough for it to matter) will vary from story to story. In spy and technothriller fiction, such agents are an extreme form of what's commonly known as "sleeper agents", or just "sleepers". See also Mind Control , Brainwashed , Berserk Button , Morality Dial , Tomato in the Mirror , Conveniently Unverifiable Cover Story , Alternate Identity Amnesia , and Lotus-Eater Machine . Compare Memory Gambit , which is when you do this to yourself. May require Deprogramming to cure and, if not cured sufficiently thoroughly, is one of the causes of Brainwash Residue . In Troper Addition, this trope is Memory Gambit and Neuro-Vault meet Deep Cover Agent . Do not confuse this trope with The Münchausen . Doesn't have to be from Manchuria.
